name: Three-Act Structure
description: The classic beginning-middle-end structure used in most storytelling.

beats.name: Setup
beats.prompt: Introduce your protagonist, their world, and their normal life. What do they want? What's missing?

beats.name: Inciting Incident
beats.prompt: What event disrupts your protagonist's normal world and sets the story in motion?

beats.name: First Plot Point
beats.prompt: What decision or event pushes your protagonist into the main conflict? There's no going back.

beats.name: Rising Action
beats.prompt: Your protagonist pursues their goal. What obstacles do they face? How do they grow or change?

beats.name: Midpoint
beats.prompt: A major revelation or shift. The stakes get higher. What changes everything?

beats.name: Complications
beats.prompt: Things get worse. Allies may fail, plans fall apart. What pushes your protagonist to their lowest point?

beats.name: Crisis / Dark Night
beats.prompt: The lowest point. All seems lost. What internal or external forces threaten to defeat your protagonist?

beats.name: Climax
beats.prompt: The final confrontation. Your protagonist faces their greatest challenge. How do they fight?

beats.name: Resolution
beats.prompt: The aftermath. How has your protagonist changed? What's their new normal?
